answer:
Walkers Percy and Barbara Kingsolver are both American authors. Walker Percy was an American novelist, essayist, and philosopher, while Barbara Kingsolver is an American novelist, essayist, and environmental activist. Both authors have made significant contributions to literature and have explored themes related to human experience, identity, and the natural world. 

<answer> Both Walker Percy and Barbara Kingsolver are American authors who have made significant contributions to literature and explored themes related to human experience, identity, and the natural world. </answer>
